The ARC commitment

A roof is not just a line item. It is the system protecting everything beneath it.

ARC brings a disciplined, homeowner-first process to repair, replacement, storm damage, gutters, inspections, and commercial work. You should know what was found, what it means, what the options are, and what happens next.

Clear communication. Honest recommendations. Work that stands behind the logo.

The ARC standard

Core Values — C.O.V.E.R. is the operating standard behind every ARC job.

These values should be visible in the inspection, the recommendation, the crew's jobsite behavior, the final walkthrough, and the response after the work is complete.

C

Craftsmanship

Doing the job right the first time with quality materials, skilled workmanship, and attention to detail.

O

Ownership

Standing behind the work, communicating clearly, and taking responsibility from the first call to final walkthrough.

V

Value

Delivering honest recommendations, transparent pricing, and solutions that protect the investment for years to come.

E

Excellence

Holding every project to high standards for safety, service, professionalism, and customer experience.

R

Reliability

Showing up, following through, and keeping promises when homeowners need ARC most.

Storm damage response

When a storm hits, start with facts—not pressure.

ARC documents what is present, explains what the findings mean, and helps you decide whether repair, maintenance, or a claim discussion is the right next step.

Request a storm inspection → Priority scheduling: (770) 376-0704
  1. 01
    Inspect and document

    Roof coverings, flashing, vents, gutters, and visible collateral conditions are reviewed.

  2. 02
    Explain the condition

    You see the photos and understand the practical implications before deciding anything.

  3. 03
    Recommend responsibly

    ARC discusses the right next step based on condition—not a quota or sales script.

  4. 04
    Deliver and close out

    Clear scope, property protection, cleanup, and final walkthrough keep ownership visible through completion.

Homeowner questions

Clear answers before the first appointment.

You shouldn't have to guess how ARC works. Call or text anytime at (770) 376-0704.

How do I know whether I need a roof repair or replacement?

ARC inspects the roof condition, documents what is present, explains what is repairable, and gives a recommendation tied to the remaining service life and risk — not merely the size of the job.

What happens during a storm-damage inspection?

The inspection documents visible roofing, flashing, vent, gutter, and related exterior conditions. ARC then explains the findings and practical options before you make any decision.

Will ARC help me understand the insurance process?

ARC can explain the observed condition and help you organize documentation. We do not promise claim approval or imply that all storm events result in covered replacement.

What should I expect on installation day?

ARC covers property protection, crew arrival time, materials delivery, noise expectations, cleanup, a magnetic nail sweep, and a final walkthrough before the job is considered closed.

What areas does ARC serve?

ARC serves Carrollton and the surrounding West Georgia communities, as well as the greater Atlanta metro area. Call (770) 376-0704 to confirm service in your area.
